description: 50 compositional queries for SkillWeaver benchmark — 25 easy (2 skills, 2 categories), 15 medium (3 skills, 3 categories), 10 hard (4-5 skills, 4-5 categories)

queries.query: Create a GitHub pull request and notify the team on Slack
Fetch the weather forecast and send it to Telegram
Search for files in the repo and create a GitHub issue with the results
Read a CSV file and generate a summary chart
Check the latest GitHub notifications and reply on Slack
Download a file from a URL and save it to disk
Run a shell command and post the output to Discord
Create a calendar event and send an email reminder
Translate a text file and save the translation
Fetch a web page and extract all links
Create a GitHub release and notify on Slack
Read a JSON config file and validate its schema
List all Docker containers and send status to Telegram
Query a database and export results to CSV
Take a screenshot of a webpage and email it
Parse a log file and count error occurrences
Create a Telegram bot command and test it
Fetch RSS feeds and summarize articles
Generate a QR code image and save it
Check disk usage and alert on Slack if above threshold
Read iMessage history and count messages per contact
Create a GitHub branch and push changes
Fetch API data and format as markdown table
Run tests and post results to Discord
Convert a document to PDF and email it
Clone a repo, run linter, and create a GitHub issue with results
Fetch weather data, generate a chart, and post to Slack
Read a CSV, compute statistics, and save results as JSON
Search GitHub issues, filter by label, and notify on Telegram
Scrape a webpage, extract data, and save to database
Run a Docker container, collect logs, and send to Slack
Read iMessage history, analyze sentiment, and generate report
Fetch calendar events, check conflicts, and send email alerts
Create a GitHub wiki page with API documentation
Monitor a website, detect changes, and notify on Discord
Generate an image from text description and post to Telegram
Query database for user stats, generate charts, and email report
Parse PDF document, extract tables, and save as CSV
Run security scan on repo, format results, and create GitHub issue
Export Slack channel history, analyze sentiment, and generate a report chart
Collect data from 3 different APIs, merge and clean the datasets, run statistical analysis, visualize trends, and publish results to a GitHub wiki page
Clone a repo, check out a feature branch, run all linters, fix auto-fixable issues, create a PR, and notify the team on Slack and Discord
Download a dataset, train a simple model, evaluate it, save the model and metrics, and send an email with the results
Check all connected channels, collect unread message counts, aggregate by platform, format a dashboard image, and post it to Telegram
Read a technical paper PDF, extract methodology section, reproduce the experiment setup in code, run the benchmark, compare results with the paper's claims, and write a replication report
Query the database for user activity, find top users, check GitHub contribution graphs, cross-reference with Slack messages, and generate a comprehensive activity report
Monitor running Docker containers, collect resource metrics, identify anomalies, restart unhealthy containers, log the incident, and notify via email and Telegram
Set up a new project: init git repo, create directory structure, write config files, add CI pipeline, install dependencies, scaffold tests, and push to GitHub with a Slack announcement
Scrape a competitor website, extract pricing data, compare with our pricing, generate a summary table, and save as PDF for review
Ingest iMessage history, identify contacts with most messages, filter by date range, compute reply time distributions, generate charts, and export as a markdown report
